uk: Блаженного священномученика Павла Гойдича, єпископа Пряшівського.
saints.en: St. Great Martyr Marina. Blessed Hieromartyr Paul Gojdich, Bishop of Presov

rubrics:
Вечірня: катизма чергова. На «Господи, взиваю» - 6 стихир влкмчц., Сл.: влкмчц, І нині: хрестобогород. Прокімен дня. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар влкмчц., Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря влкмчц. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. влкмчц.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар влкмчц. (2), Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря влкмчц. Катизми черг., сідальні Октоїха. Пс. 50. Канон Октоїха і влкмчц. На 9-ій пісні – «Чеснішу від херувимів». По 9-ій – світильний Октоїха, Сл.: світильний влкмчц., І нині: його богород. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар влкмчц., Сл., І нині: богород. за гласом тропаря влкмчц. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. влкмчц.
Часи: на 1-му – дня; на 6-му – храму; на 3-му та 9-му – влкмчц.
Літургія: вся Служба – дня. Ап. – 1 Кор. 148 зач.; 11, 8-22. Єв. – Мт. 71 зач.; 17, 10-18.

troparion_en.text:
(Podoben: “Let us worship the Word...”)
O glorious Marina, once betrothed to the Word,  / you renounced all worldly concerns and struggled as a beautiful virgin. /  You soundly trounced the invisible Enemy who appeared to you, O Champion,  / and now you are a wellspring of healing grace for the world.

kontakion_en.text: Today Marina crushes the head of the Enemy,1    / having received a crown of victory from Heaven,   / she bound and struck the one whom the Prophets could not restrain.   / Therefore, she became an adornment of the Martyrs,   / as well as their glory.

troparion.text:
(Podoben: “Let us worship the Word...”)
O glorious Marina, once betrothed to the Word,  / you renounced all worldly concerns and struggled as a beautiful virgin. /  You soundly trounced the invisible Enemy who appeared to you, O Champion,  / and now you are a wellspring of healing grace for the world.

kontakion.text: Today Marina crushes the head of the Enemy,1    / having received a crown of victory from Heaven,   / she bound and struck the one whom the Prophets could not restrain.   / Therefore, she became an adornment of the Martyrs,   / as well as their glory.

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Irenarchus, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Translation of the relics of Venerable Lazarus of Mount Galesius near Ephesus

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Lazarus, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Royal Passionbearers Tsar Nicholas (Nikolai), Tsaritsa Alexandra, Tsarevich Aleksy, Grand Duchesses Olga, Tatiana, Maria, Anastasia

troparion.text: Most noble and sublime was your life and death, O Sovereigns; / wise Nicholas and blest Alexandra, we praise you, / acclaiming your piety, meekness, faith, and humility, / whereby you attained to crowns of glory in Christ our God, / with your five renowned and godly children of blessed fame. / O passion-bearers decked in purple, intercede for us.

kontakion.text: Royalty and martyrdom were joined together, O blessed ones, / in your death for righteousness and right belief, O wise Sovereigns, / Nicholas and Alexandra, with your five children. / Hence, Christ our God counted you worthy of thrones in Heaven; / and with twofold crowns of glory, / you reign forever, adorned with grace divine.

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Leonid, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!
